title: breonia louvelii
intro: Breonia louvelii, also known as Koko or African Breonia, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It is a shrub-like plant that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimalarial, and antimicrobial effects. The plant's extracts have been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Breonia louvelii can be prepared into herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
